Notice Of Motion And Motion From Litigating Any Dispute Over Legal Fees Awarded In Any Court Other Than This Court; Dec Of Matthew J. Matern
Off Calendar Nov-26-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: MATTHEW MATERN AN INDIVIDUAL, and MATERN LAW GROUP, PC's Motion From Litigating Any Dispute Over Legal Fees Awarded In Any Court Other Than This Court.

Appearances:
David Krol, Esq., in person, of VALENSI ROSE, PLC, (310) 277-8011, for Defendants MATERN LAW
GROUP, PC, a professional corporation; MATTHEW J. MATERN.

Arnold C. Wang, Esq., via Zoom videoconference, of ARIAS SANGUINETTI WANG & TEAM LLP, (310) 844-9696, for RASTEGAR & MATERN, ATTORNEYS AT LAW and FARZAD RASTEGAR.

RE: Motion From Litigating Any Dispute Over Legal Fees Awarded In Any Court Other Than This Court. The matter is argued. At the conclusion of argument, the subject matter is taken under submission.

Mtn To Compel Pltf'S Depositions & Req For Monetary Sanctions; Pos

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Hector R. Martinez and Christian Raisner on behalf of PLaintiffs, Kurt Wilson appearing on behalf of the Defendants, and Court Reporter Sandy Boston, CSR 5770.

Notice And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-25-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Hector R. Martinez and Christian Raisner on behalf of PLaintiffs, Kurt Wilson appearing on behalf of the Defendants, and Court Reporter Sandy Boston, CSR 5770.

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.
Defendant ABM's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One, is granted. All objections are overruled. Plaintiffs' failure to respond fully was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiffs are ordered to respond further within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiffs in the amount of $1,160, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order.
H (612)

Notice And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-25-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Hector R. Martinez and Christian Raisner on behalf of PLaintiffs, Kurt Wilson appearing on behalf of the Defendants, and Court Reporter Sandy Boston, CSR 5770.

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.

Defendant ABM's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, is granted. All objections, except as to privilege, are overruled and ordered stricken. Plaintiffs are ordered to respond further. If the response is that Plaintiffs have no documents except those that have been produced, and describes with particularity any documents that are withheld pursuant to a claim of privilege, that response may be adequate. Defendant's request for sanctions is denied.
COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT (612)
